en: Hey, I got you some comic books here.
How's your daughter? What was her name?
Grace. What?
I don't know. She lives with her mother in Chicago. I don't get to see her much.
ko: 잘 모르겠어. 그녀는 시카고에서 엄마와 살고 있어. 자주 보지 못해.

en: What's in the briefcase?
I'm on my way to the airport.
ko: 공항 가는 중이야. 종이 작업자가 미네소타에서 일하고 있어.

en: There's a paper hanger.
He's working his way through Minnesota.
Oh, jeez.
He's driving us crazy.
You got any of the checks?
Yeah, yeah. I got a counterfeit he drew on Red Lake Savings and Loan.
ko: 응, 응. 레드 레이크 저축은행에서 그가 그린 위조 수표가 있어.

en: See, he's just using a stencil machine and an underwood.
ko: 봐, 그는 스텐실 기계와 언더우드를 사용하고 있어.

en: Yeah, to tell her at the bank.
I don't know. I don't know.
See, he's just using a stencil machine and an underwood.
ko: 봐, 그는 스텐실 기계와 언더우드를 사용하고 있어.

en: Yeah, to tell her at the bank. Say again?
It's definitely to tell her, Carl.
I mean, banks, they always use hand stamps for the dates, see?
ko: 은행은 날짜를 위해 항상 손 도장을 사용하잖아, 봐?

en: They get used over and over again, so you always get worn out.
